title: Popcorners
description: The crunchy and wholesome popped-corn snack is now in Minecraft, in HD!
body:
This mod adds 3 of the Popcorners chip flavors to the game! 

White Chedder 

Kettle Corn 

Sea Salt.

It also adds a block of Popcorner chips. Everything in this mod can be crafted in survival mode!

Originally made for and featured in this video of mine...
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/y4wCFINg-nU" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

I am not affiliated with Popcorners in anyway, I just like their chips
